steps.expected: Dashboard shows links, buttons, and create CTA
steps.observed: Dashboard shows Dashboard, Products, Logout, and Create your first product links/buttons.
Body text contains 'No products yet' and 'Products will appear here once created'.

steps.expected: Shows Dashboard, Products links. Disabled links Transfers, Settings
steps.observed: Snapshot only returned Dashboard, Products, Logout. (Transfers, Settings were present in DOM but maybe not interactive or missed by interactive snapshot? Will note as friction)
Email, Password inputs and Sign In button present
Build completed successfully, generating static pages.

frictions.description: Clicking Logout button with agent-browser click @e3 failed with 'Resource temporarily unavailable', required using evaluate script to click it.
frictions.resolution: Used agent-browser eval to find and click the Logout button.

frictions.description: Disabled sidebar links (Transfers, Settings) do not show up in the interactive snapshot (-i flag) of agent-browser.
frictions.resolution: Relied on screenshot validation to verify disabled visual state.
